text: The organization shall maintain a documented information security incident response process covering detection, triage, containment, eradication, recovery, communication, and post-incident review.
title: Documented incident response process

text: The organization shall assign incident response roles and responsibilities, including escalation ownership and decision authority for incident handling.
title: Incident response roles and responsibilities

text: The organization shall test the incident response process through tabletop exercises, simulations, or equivalent drills and track lessons learned.
title: Testing of incident response capability

text: The organization shall define reporting and escalation channels for suspected or confirmed information security incidents, including time-bound notification criteria.
title: Incident reporting and escalation
